design.colorsDesc: Applied across every page of your site.
design.typographyDesc: Fonts for headings, body and labels.
design.buttonsDesc: Shape and color of every button.
design.gridDesc: Layout, columns and spacing of your work grid.

colors.note: Changes apply site-wide via CSS variables.

typography.note: Changes apply site-wide via CSS variables.

grid.descMosaic: An editorial layout with mixed, art-directed cell sizes.
grid.descUniform: An even grid of equal cells.
grid.descMasonry: Keeps each photo's aspect ratio — boxes vary in height (VSCO-style).
grid.fitCropDesc: Photos fill each cell, cropping the edges.
grid.fitWholeDesc: Whole photo shown, letterboxed inside the cell.
grid.loadMoreOn: Shows photos in batches behind a “Load more” button.
grid.loadMoreOff: Shows a selection with an “All projects” link.

settings.title: Title
settings.exportDesc: Downloads a static HTML file of the current template with all your edits applied.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

hero.subtext: The all-in-one platform built for serious photographers. Portfolio, e-commerce, cloud storage, and client galleries — all in one place.
hero.trust: No credit card required · Cancel anytime · 14-day free trial

items.title:
Craft your
visual identity.
items.body: Build stunning portfolio websites with zero code. Choose from layouts designed specifically for photographers — galleries, masonry, editorial, and more.

items.title:
Turn every
shot into income.
items.body: Sell prints, digital files, and commercial licenses directly from your portfolio. Zero commission. Set your prices, keep everything.

items.title:
Your archive,
always protected.
items.body: Store your entire library in the cloud — RAW, TIFF, JPEG, DNG. Organize with smart folders, tags, and metadata. Access anywhere.

items.title:
Client galleries
they'll love.
items.body: Send interactive galleries with selection tools, download links, and approval workflows. Make the delivery experience as premium as your work.

steps.title: Upload your work
steps.body: Drag and drop your photos. RAW, TIFF, JPEG, DNG — every format supported. Your files are encrypted and backed up automatically.

steps.title: Build your portfolio
steps.body: Choose a layout, add your logo, set your custom domain. Your portfolio goes live in minutes. No code, no designer needed.

steps.title: Grow your business
steps.body: Sell prints and licenses, deliver client galleries, track analytics. Your portfolio is your storefront — open 24/7.

pricing.subtitle: 14-day free trial on all plans. No credit card required.
pricing.note:
All plans include SSL, CDN delivery, and 99.9% uptime SLA.
Annual billing saves up to 20%. Switch plans anytime.

plans.name: Starter
plans.description: Everything you need to start building your photography business online.

plans.name: Pro
plans.description: For professional photographers who are serious about growing their income.

plans.name: Studio
plans.description: For studios and agencies managing multiple photographers and clients.

items.quote: Portapic turned my portfolio into a business. In my first month selling prints I made $3,200. The platform just gets out of the way.
The client delivery galleries are a game-changer. My couples can browse, select, and approve — no back-and-forth emails. It's professional on every level.
I've tried every platform out there. Portapic is the only one that understands the RAW workflow. The storage management is seamless.
Zero commission on sales is unreal. I was losing hundreds every month on other platforms. Portapic changed my numbers completely.
My portfolio loads faster than anything I've had before. Clients constantly mention how beautiful and smooth it feels. It reflects directly on my work.
The analytics show me exactly which photos convert. I can see what my clients love and price accordingly. Data-driven creativity.

ctaBanner.subtext: Join 12,000+ photographers already building their business on Portapic. No credit card required.

footer.tagline: The all-in-one platform built for professional photographers.

home.webPresenceHint: Everything clients see — keep it current.
home.organizeBody: {n} projects · arrange covers, edit copy, swap photos.
home.galleryHint: Upload, organize, and search your photos.

cs.footer: We're building this next. Keep using your portfolio and gallery in the meantime.

delivery.title: Client delivery
delivery.tagline: Hand finished galleries to your clients on private, branded download pages — no more WeTransfer links or zip files buried in email.
delivery.f1d: Each client gets their own password-protected page to view and download their photos.
delivery.f2d: Deliver full-resolution originals and web-ready exports, one by one or as a zip.
delivery.f3d: Let clients star their picks so you know exactly which shots to retouch.
delivery.f4d: Your logo, your colors, and optional expiry dates on every delivery.

links.title: Link builder
links.tagline: A single link-in-bio page that ties everything together — your portfolio, galleries, socials and contact, all on one branded page for Instagram and TikTok.
links.f1d: Point your bio at one page that links to your portfolio, galleries and shop.
links.f2d: Instagram, WhatsApp, email and more, with the icons your clients expect.
links.f3d: Arrange your links and dividers exactly how you want them, no code.
links.f4d: Pick a style that matches your brand and stays consistent with your portfolio.

portfolioPage.title: Portfolio
portfolioPage.newSub: Start a fresh site from scratch

galleryPage.title: Gallery
galleryPage.emptyBody: Drag photos here, or upload from your device.

profilePage.emailHint: Used to sign in. Contact support to change it.

template.title: Template
template.subtitle: Pick the visual style of your portfolio. You can switch any time.

domain.subtitle: The address visitors use to reach this portfolio.
domain.emptyHint: Leave empty to use the free address above.

domain.dnsNote: Saved. Domain routing activates once verified — coming soon. For now the portfolio is live at the address above.

seo.title: SEO
seo.subtitle: How your portfolio shows up in search results and social shares.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.subtitle: How your published portfolio is performing.
analytics.notPublishedBody: Publish this portfolio to start counting views.
analytics.moreSoonBody: Total views are tracked in real time. Traffic sources, top content, sessions and per-day trends will land here once event tracking is in place — shown only when there's real data, never placeholders.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Privacy and danger zone.
settings.passwordHint: Visitors need a password to view this portfolio.
settings.passwordActive: Password active — visitors must enter it.
settings.dangerBody: Deleting "{title}" can't be undone. All categories, folders, and photos under this portfolio will be permanently removed.

picker.emptyBody: Upload photos to include them now, or add them later in the editor.

preview.none: No photos selected — you can add them in the editor after creating.

right.galleryBody: Pick photos from your library to include — or upload new ones.
right.overviewWith: These photos will be added to your portfolio.
right.overviewNone: Nothing selected yet — that's fine, add photos later.
right.addressBody: The URL clients will use to reach your portfolio.
